ddls:
CREATE TABLE "batteries" (
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery */,
  "battery_model" TEXT /* Model of the battery */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the battery */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date the battery was manufactured */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Nominal capacity of the battery in Ah */,
  "chemistry" TEXT /* Chemistry of the battery (e.g., Lithium-ion, Lead-acid) */,
  "last_test_date" TEXT /* Date of the last test conducted on the battery */,
  "cell_count" INTEGER /* Number of cells in the battery */,
  "module_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the battery modules (e.g., series, parallel) */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batteries_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES battery_manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "sys_idx" INTEGER /* System index for the test configuration */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Data value recorded during the test */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from the test (e.g., Ok, Error) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery being tested */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was conducted (e.g., lab, field) */,
  "test_temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the test in degrees Celsius */,
  "test_humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the test in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_tests_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_tests_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type (e.g., Performance, Diagnostic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "test_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters required for the test (e.g., voltage, current) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., voltage, current) */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., V, A) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES battery_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., view tests, edit tests) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view test, edit test) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
